title: taraxacum sonckii
intro: Taraxacum sonckii, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and kidney stones. The health benefits of Taraxacum sonckii include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
